use tokio::sync::Notify;
use tokio::sync::watch;
use std::sync::Arc;

async fn wait_for_data(notify: Arc<Notify>, mut shutdown: watch::Receiver<bool>) {
    tokio::select! {
        _ = notify.notified() => {
            process_data();
        }
        _ = shutdown.changed() => {
            return;
        }
    }
}

fn process_data() {}
